data.title: Venova Technologies receives $2.23M NIH grant for novel contraceptive device. Women-led startup focusing on hormone-free birth control.
data.description: A female birth control startup based in Cambridge, Venova Technologies, Inc., has recently secured a significant milestone in their development. The women-led company has received a $2.23 million Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) Phase II Grant from the National Institutes of Health (NIH). This grant is part of a competitive program aimed at encouraging technological advancements within U.S. small businesses ultimately leading to commercialization. Venova's innovative product is a long-acting, hormone-free, and copper-free birth control device.

data.title: REX Shares introduces 2 new T-REX 2X Single-Stock ETFs: SMUP & CRWU for 2x daily exposure to SMR & CRWV stocks.
data.description: REX Shares has recently unveiled two new leveraged ETFs, the T-REX 2X Long SMR Daily Target ETF (CBOE: SMUP) and the T-REX 2X Long CRWV Daily Target ETF (CBOE: CRWU). These ETFs provide traders with double daily exposure to NuScale Power Corporation (SMR) and CoreWeave (CRWV). NuScale Power Corporation is a leading small modular nuclear reactor technology company, while CoreWeave specializes in AI and GPU cloud infrastructure. The introduction of SMUP and CRWU contributes to the expansion of REX's diverse range of T-REX ETFs, designed to cater to varying investment strategies.

data.title: Strategy announces pricing IPO of 28,011,111 shares of STRC Stock at $90/share on July 24, 2025, settling on July 29, 2025.
data.description: Tysons Corner, Virginia - Today, Strategy™ disclosed the details of its initial public offering on July 24, 2025. The offering consisted of 28,011,111 shares of Variable Rate Series A Perpetual Stretch Preferred Stock, named the "STRC Stock," priced at $90 per share for public purchase. The settlement for the issuance and sale of the STRC Stock is expected to occur on July 29, 2025, pending standard closing requirements. Strategy anticipates receiving approximately [dollar amount calculated based on the numbers provided] in net proceeds from the offering.

data.title: InvoiceCloud named a top tech workplace for the 4th year by Energage, recognized as a 2025 Top Workplace.
data.description: In the bustling city of Boston, InvoiceCloud has been recognized as a Top Workplace in the Technology sector for the year 2025 by Energage. This accolade highlights the company's commitment to providing a positive and engaging work environment for its employees.

data.title: CenterPoint Energy (CNP) investing $53 billion in capital plan, 800 new jobs by 2030 to meet 50% surge in electricity demand.
data.description: CenterPoint Energy Inc. (NYSE: CNP) is increasing its hiring efforts and infrastructure investments to meet the growing electricity demands in Houston. The company aims to hire 200 lineworkers by the end of 2025 and nearly 800 by 2030 in support of a $53 billion capital plan spanning 10 years. With electricity demand in the region expected to rise by 50% by 2031, these initiatives are crucial. CenterPoint is actively recruiting through job fairs, collaborating with organizations like the Greater Houston Partnership, and launching a new training program named Energy Expressway. This free program, beginning in October, provides both hands-on and online training opportunities.

data.title: Ponce Financial Group, Inc. reveals Q2 earnings; holding company for Ponce Bank states financial results for 2025's second quarter.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, Ponce Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: PDLB) revealed its second-quarter 2025 outcomes. The Company serves as the holding firm for Ponce Bank and shared financial data.

data.title: Advance Auto Parts (NYSE: AAP) will release Q2 2025 results on July 12, 2025; conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET on August 14, 2025.
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina, Advance Auto Parts, Inc., a top automotive aftermarket parts supplier in North America catering to professional installers and DIY customers, is set to release its second-quarter financial results for the period ending July 12, 2025. This update will be made public before the market opens on Thursday, August 14, 2025. To discuss these results, the company has organized a conference call and webcast scheduled to commence at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day. Interested parties can join a live webcast on the company's Investor Relations page. Advance Auto Parts trades on the NYSE under the ticker symbol AAP.

data.title: Mega Matrix Inc. completes $16M private placement, entering stablecoin sector.Expansion plans underway.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, Mega Matrix Inc. (NYSE American: MPU) disclosed the successful closure of a private placement that raised US$16 million. This funding infusion will serve as a sturdy financial base for the company's planned expansion into Stablecoin.

data.title: Koppers Holdings Inc. (NYSE: KOP) to release Q2 2025 financial results, scheduling conference call.
data.description: Today, in Pittsburgh, Koppers Holdings Inc., a global company specializing in treated wood products, wood treatment chemicals, and carbon compounds, revealed their intention to unveil their financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 before the end of the day. The company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol KOP, is a key player in the market with a significant global reach. Stay tuned for more updates on this anticipated financial report.
Secured Overnight Financing rate: 4.30% July 24th vs 4.28% July 23rd

data.title: Gold Reserve objects to Special Master's recommendation for Dalinar Energy Corp. to buy PDV Holding, Inc. in court. (char. 97)
data.description: In Bermuda, Gold Reserve Ltd. - listed on TSX.V as GRZ and on OTCQX as GDRZF - has revealed that in compliance with the U.S. District Court for the District of Delaware, multiple entities submitted documents supporting their dissent to the Special Master's Final Recommendation. The proposal in question involves Gold Reserve's American acquisition arm, Dalinar Energy Corporation, being chosen by the Court to buy the stocks of PDV Holding, Inc.

data.title: Canopy Growth to report Q1 fiscal 2026 results on Aug 8, 2025 with webcast at 10 AM ET. CEO and CFO to host.
data.description: A company based in Smiths Falls, Ontario, Canopy Growth Corporation, will be announcing its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026, which ended on June 30, 2025. The results will be made public before the financial markets open on August 8, 2025. Following this release, an audio webcast featuring CEO Luc Mongeau and Interim CFO Tom Stewart will take place at 10 AM Eastern Time (ET) on the same day. Canopy Growth's stock is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) under the symbol WEED and on the NASDAQ as CGC.

data.title: Wall Street analysts discuss 3 real estate stocks with over 6% dividend yields. Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. has a dividend yield of 8.98%, with analyst accuracy rate of 64%. Truist Securities analyst Patrick Scholes downgraded the stock from Buy to Hold. Read more on Benzinga.com.
data.description: In times of market turbulence, many investors seek dividend-yielding stocks, which are typically companies with strong free cash flows that reward shareholders with high dividends. For the latest analyst opinions on popular stocks, Benzinga offers an Analyst Stock Ratings page where readers can access ratings from accurate analysts. Among the top analysts for three high-yielding stocks in real estate are: Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: PK) with a dividend yield of 8.98%. Analyst Daniel Politzer from JP Morgan started coverage on June 23, 2025, with an Underweight rating and a $10 price target, boasting a 64% accuracy rate. Truist Securities analyst Patrick Scholes recently downgraded the stock from Buy to Hold, reducing the price target from $16 to $11. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga's website.

data.title: Bitcoin falls below $117,000 due to whale selloffs. Ethereum holds at $3,730.88. XRP stays steady at $3.13. 141,129 traders liquidated for $534.38M. Tweets on short squeeze possibility near $115,000 level.
data.description: The cryptocurrency market is experiencing a slight decline as Bitcoin drops below $117,000 due to increased whale selloffs. Prices of major cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin - $116,634.79, Ethereum - $3,730.88, Solana - $181.14, XRP - $3.13, Dogecoin - $0.2325, and Shiba Inu - $0.00001369. Key stats reveal a 5.8% and 5.1% rise in large transactions for Bitcoin and Ethereum, while daily active addresses dropped 6% and grew 3.5%, respectively. Coinglass reported liquidation of 141,129 traders totaling $534.38 million in 24 hours. IntoTheBlock data shows net inflows of $226.6 million into spot Bitcoin ETFs and $231.2 million into spot Ethereum ETFs. Traders are monitoring Bitcoin's movement below $117,000 with expectations that spot buyers at $115,000 could lead to a short squeeze. For further details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.
